data.current_summary: Query SMTP API tokens by campaign name or an emailCampaignId.
data.current_description: Query multiple SMTP API tokens by campaign name or a single token by emailCampaignId.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve SMTP API tokens with optional filtering by campaign name or emailCampaignId. Supports pagination through forward paging parameters. Returns a collection of SmtpApiTokenView objects containing token ID, password, and associated campaign information. Use campaign name to retrieve multiple tokens or emailCampaignId to retrieve a single token.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about pagination support, return format, and how the filtering parameters work together. Added clarity on pagination, explicit mention of returned schema type, and distinction between single vs. multiple token retrieval modes to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new SMTP API token for email sending
data.description_suggestion: Create a new SMTP API token that can be used to authenticate requests to the HubSpot SMTP API for sending transactional emails. Accepts a SmtpApiTokenRequestEgg object containing the token configuration. Returns a SmtpApiTokenView object with the generated token ID and password. The returned credentials must be securely stored as they are required for SMTP authentication and cannot be retrieved later.

data.current_summary: Delete a single token by ID.
data.current_description: Delete a single token by ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Archive and disable an SMTP API token
data.description_suggestion: Archive and permanently disable an SMTP API token by its ID. Once deleted, the token can no longer be used for SMTP authentication and any applications using this token will fail to authenticate. This action cannot be undone. Use with caution as it will immediately invalidate all SMTP connections using this token.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description use 'delete' which is ambiguous - the operation ID suggests 'archive'. This helps AI agents understand the severity and proper usage of this operation.
